title: rubus banningii subsp. eubanningii
intro: Rubus banningii subsp. eubanningii, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus banningii subsp. eubanningii include its potential to prevent cell damage, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health, making it a sought-after ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal supplements. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
